component.name: druid
component.description: Druid - A Distributed Column Store

component.name: druid-core
component.description: Core druid module

component.name: datasketches-java
component.description: Core sketch algorithms used alone and by other Java repositories in the DataSketches library.

component.name: datasketches-memory
component.description: High-performance native memory access.

component.name: commons-io
component.description: The Apache Commons IO library contains utility classes, stream implementations, file filters, file comparators, endian transformation classes, and much more.

component.name: commons-lang
component.description: Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-compress
component.description: Apache Commons Compress software defines an API for working with compression and archive formats. These include: bzip2, gzip, pack200, lzma, xz, Snappy, traditional Unix Compress, DEFLATE, DEFLATE64, LZ4, Brotli, Zstandard and ar, cpio, jar, tar, zip, dump, 7z, arj.

component.name: config-magic
component.description: A configuration object convenience library.

component.name: hibernate-validator
component.description: Hibernate's Bean Validation (JSR-303) reference implementation.

component.name: jboss-logging
component.description: The JBoss Logging Framework

component.name: classmate
component.description: Library for introspecting types with full generic information including resolving of field and method types.

component.name: javax.el-api
component.description: Java.net - The Source for Java Technology Collaboration

component.name: javax.el
component.description: Java.net - The Source for Java Technology Collaboration

component.name: jaxb-api
component.description: JAXB (JSR 222) API

component.name: javax.activation-api
component.description: ${project.name}

component.name: guava
component.description:
Guava is a suite of core and expanded libraries that include utility classes, google's collections, io classes, and much much more.
Guava has only one code dependency - javax.annotation, per the JSR-305 spec.

component.name: jackson-core
component.description: Core Jackson processing abstractions (aka Streaming API), implementation for JSON

component.name: jackson-annotations
component.description: Core annotations used for value types, used by Jackson data binding package.

component.name: jackson-databind
component.description: General data-binding functionality for Jackson: works on core streaming API

component.name: jackson-datatype-guava
component.description: Add-on datatype-support module for Jackson (https://github.com/FasterXML/jackson) that handles Guava (http://code.google.com/p/guava-libraries/) types (currently mostly just collection ones)

component.name: jackson-datatype-joda
component.description: Add-on module for Jackson (http://jackson.codehaus.org) to support Joda (http://joda-time.sourceforge.net/) data types.

component.name: jackson-dataformat-smile
component.description: Support for reading and writing Smile ("binary JSON") encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: guice
component.description: Guice is a lightweight dependency injection framework for Java 6 and above

component.name: javax.inject
component.description: The javax.inject API

component.name: aopalliance
component.description: AOP Alliance

component.name: guice-multibindings
component.description: Guice is a lightweight dependency injection framework for Java 6 and above

component.name: jdbi
component.description: jDBI is designed to provide convenient tabular data access in Java(tm). It uses the Java collections framework for query results, provides a convenient means of externalizing sql statements, and provides named parameter support for any database being used.

component.name: joda-time
component.description: Date and time library to replace JDK date handling

component.name: log4j-api
component.description: The Apache Log4j API

component.name: log4j-core
component.description: The Apache Log4j Implementation

component.name: log4j-slf4j-impl
component.description: The Apache Log4j SLF4J API binding to Log4j 2 Core

component.name: log4j-jul
component.description: The Apache Log4j implementation of java.util.logging

component.name: log4j-1.2-api
component.description: The Apache Log4j 1.x Compatibility API

component.name: slf4j-api
component.description: The slf4j API

component.name: jcl-over-slf4j
component.description: JCL 1.1.1 implemented over SLF4J

component.name: airline
component.description: Java annotation-based framework for parsing Git like command line structures

component.name: jackson-jq
component.description: jq for Jackson JSON Processor

component.name: joni
component.description: Java port of Oniguruma: http://www.geocities.jp/kosako3/oniguruma that uses byte arrays directly instead of java Strings and chars

component.name: jcodings
component.description: Byte based encoding support library for java

component.name: fastutil
component.description: fastutil extends the Java Collections Framework by providing type-specific maps, sets, lists and priority queues with a small memory footprint and fast access and insertion; provides also big (64-bit) arrays, sets and lists, and fast, practical I/O classes for binary and text files.

component.name: netty-buffer
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-common
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-codec-http
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-transport
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-resolver
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-codec
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-handler
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: opencsv
component.description: A simple library for reading and writing CSV in Java

component.name: commons-lang3
component.description: Apache Commons Lang, a package of Java utility classes for the classes that are in java.lang's hierarchy, or are considered to be so standard as to justify existence in java.lang.

component.name: commons-text
component.description: Apache Commons Text is a library focused on algorithms working on strings.

component.name: commons-beanutils
component.description: Apache Commons BeanUtils provides an easy-to-use but flexible wrapper around reflection and introspection.

component.name: commons-logging
component.description: Commons Logging is a thin adapter allowing configurable bridging to other, well known logging systems.

component.name: commons-collections
component.description: Types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: commons-collections4
component.description: The Apache Commons Collections package contains types that extend and augment the Java Collections Framework.

component.name: rhino
component.description: Rhino is an open-source implementation of JavaScript written entirely in Java. It is typically embedded into Java applications to provide scripting to end users.

component.name: xz
component.description: XZ data compression

component.name: zstd-jni
component.description: JNI bindings for Zstd native library that provides fast and high compression lossless algorithm for Java and all JVM languages.

component.name: json-path
component.description: Java port of Stefan Goessner JsonPath.

component.name: json-smart
component.description: JSON (JavaScript Object Notation) is a lightweight data-interchange format. It is easy for humans to read and write. It is easy for machines to parse and generate. It is based on a subset of the JavaScript Programming Language, Standard ECMA-262 3rd Edition - December 1999. JSON is a text format that is completely language independent but uses conventions that are familiar to programmers of the C-family of languages, including C, C++, C#, Java, JavaScript, Perl, Python, and many others. These properties make JSON an ideal data-interchange language.

component.name: accessors-smart
component.description: Java reflect give poor performance on getter setter an constructor calls, accessors-smart use ASM to speed up those calls.

component.name: asm
component.description: ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: antlr4-runtime
component.description: The ANTLR 4 Runtime

component.name: disruptor
component.description: Disruptor - Concurrent Programming Framework

component.name: jsr305
component.description: JSR305 Annotations for Findbugs

component.name: jna
component.description: Java Native Access

component.name: validation-api
component.description: Bean Validation API

component.name: async-http-client
component.description: The Async Http Client (AHC) classes.

component.name: async-http-client-netty-utils
component.description: The Async Http Client (AHC) library's purpose is to allow Java applications to easily execute HTTP requests and asynchronously process the response.

component.name: netty-codec-socks
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-handler-proxy
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-transport-native-epoll
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-transport-native-unix-common
component.description: Static library which contains common unix utilities.

component.name: netty-resolver-dns
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: netty-codec-dns
component.description: Netty is an asynchronous event-driven network application framework for rapid development of maintainable high performance protocol servers and clients.

component.name: reactive-streams
component.description: A Protocol for Asynchronous Non-Blocking Data Sequence

component.name: netty-reactive-streams
component.description: Reactive streams implementation for Netty.

component.name: javax.activation
component.description: ${project.name}

component.name: sigar
component.description: SIGAR (System Information Gatherer and Reporter) is a cross-platform, cross-language library and command-line tool for accessing operating system and hardware level information in Java, Perl, Ruby, Python, Erlang, PHP and C#.

component.name: jvm-attach-api
component.description: Tooling for distributed application development in Java

component.name: netty
component.description: The Netty project is an effort to provide an asynchronous event-driven network application framework and tools for rapid development of maintainable high performance and high scalability protocol servers and clients. In other words, Netty is a NIO client server framework which enables quick and easy development of network applications such as protocol servers and clients. It greatly simplifies and streamlines network programming such as TCP and UDP socket server.

component.name: error_prone_annotations
component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: druid-hll
component.description: Druid HyperLogLog implementation

component.name: extendedset
component.description: Implementation of CONCISE (COmpressed 'N" Composable Integer SEt) bit map compression algorithm by Alessandro Colantonio with some enhanced features - http://ricerca.mat.uniroma3.it/users/colanton/docs/concise.pdf

component.name: RoaringBitmap
component.description: Roaring bitmaps are compressed bitmaps (also called bitsets) which tend to outperform conventional compressed bitmaps such as WAH or Concise.

component.name: shims
component.description: Roaring bitmaps are compressed bitmaps (also called bitsets) which tend to outperform conventional compressed bitmaps such as WAH or Concise.

component.name: druid-processing
component.description: A module that is everything required to understands Druid Segments

component.name: compress-lzf
component.description: Compression codec for LZF encoding for particularly encoding/decoding, with reasonable compression. Compressor is basic Lempel-Ziv codec, without Huffman (deflate/gzip) or statistical post-encoding. See "http://oldhome.schmorp.de/marc/liblzf.html" for more on original LZF package.

component.name: commons-math3
component.description: The Apache Commons Math project is a library of lightweight, self-contained mathematics and statistics components addressing the most common practical problems not immediately available in the Java programming language or commons-lang.

component.name: commons-net
component.description: Apache Commons Net library contains a collection of network utilities and protocol implementations. Supported protocols include: Echo, Finger, FTP, NNTP, NTP, POP3(S), SMTP(S), Telnet, Whois

component.name: icu4j
component.description: International Component for Unicode for Java (ICU4J) is a mature, widely used Java library providing Unicode and Globalization support

component.name: lz4-java
component.description: Java ports and bindings of the LZ4 compression algorithm and the xxHash hashing algorithm

component.name: asm-commons
component.description: Usefull class adapters based on ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-tree
component.description: Tree API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: asm-analysis
component.description: Static code analysis API of ASM, a very small and fast Java bytecode manipulation framework

component.name: checker-qual
component.description: Checker Qual is the set of annotations (qualifiers) and supporting classes used by the Checker Framework to type check Java source code. Please see artifact: org.checkerframework:checker

component.name: maven-artifact
component.description: Maven is a software build management and comprehension tool. Based on the concept of a project object model: builds, dependency management, documentation creation, site publication, and distribution publication are all controlled from the declarative file. Maven can be extended by plugins to utilise a number of other development tools for reporting or the build process.

component.name: plexus-utils
component.description: A collection of various utility classes to ease working with strings, files, command lines, XML and more.

component.name: druid-aws-common
component.description: druid-aws-common

component.name: aws-java-sdk-ec2
component.description: The AWS Java SDK for Amazon EC2 module holds the client classes that are used for communicating with Amazon EC2 Service

component.name: jmespath-java
component.description: Implementation of the JMES Path JSON Query langauge for Java.

component.name: aws-java-sdk-s3
component.description: The AWS Java SDK for Amazon S3 module holds the client classes that are used for communicating with Amazon Simple Storage Service

component.name: aws-java-sdk-kms
component.description: The AWS Java SDK for AWS KMS module holds the client classes that are used for communicating with AWS Key Management Service

component.name: aws-java-sdk-core
component.description: The AWS SDK for Java - Core module holds the classes that are used by the individual service clients to interact with Amazon Web Services. Users need to depend on aws-java-sdk artifact for accessing individual client classes.

component.name: httpclient
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Client

component.name: httpcore
component.description: Apache HttpComponents Core (blocking I/O)

component.name: commons-codec
component.description: The Apache Commons Codec package contains simple encoder and decoders for various formats such as Base64 and Hexadecimal. In addition to these widely used encoders and decoders, the codec package also maintains a collection of phonetic encoding utilities.

component.name: ion-java
component.description: A Java implementation of the Amazon Ion data notation.

component.name: jackson-dataformat-cbor
component.description: Support for reading and writing Concise Binary Object Representation ([CBOR](https://www.rfc-editor.org/info/rfc7049) encoded data using Jackson abstractions (streaming API, data binding, tree model)

component.name: druid-gcp-common
component.description: Druid GCP Base Module

component.name: google-api-client
component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: google-oauth-client
component.description: Google OAuth Client Library for Java. Functionality that works on all supported Java platforms, including Java 6 (or higher) desktop (SE) and web (EE), Android, and Google App Engine.

component.name: google-http-client-jackson2
component.description: Sonatype helps open source projects to set up Maven repositories on https://oss.sonatype.org/

component.name: jackson-module-guice
component.description: Stuff to make integration with Guice a bit easier

component.name: google-http-client
component.description: Google HTTP Client Library for Java. Functionality that works on all supported Java platforms, including Java 6 (or higher) desktop (SE) and web (EE), Android, and Google App Engine.

component.name: j2objc-annotations
component.description: A set of annotations that provide additional information to the J2ObjC translator to modify the result of translation.

component.name: druid-server
component.description: Druid Server

component.name: druid-console
component.description: Unified web console for a Druid cluster

component.name: jline
component.description: JLine is a java library for reading and editing user input in console applications. It features tab-completion, command history, password masking, customizable keybindings, and pass-through handlers to use to chain to other console applications.

component.name: audience-annotations
component.description: Annotations for defining API boundaries and tools for managing javadocs

component.name: curator-framework
component.description: High-level API that greatly simplifies using ZooKeeper.

component.name: curator-x-discovery
component.description: A service discovery recipe.

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-json-provider
component.description: Functionality to handle JSON input/output for JAX-RS implementations (like Jersey and RESTeasy) using standard Jackson data binding.

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-base
component.description: Pile of code that is shared by all Jackson-based JAX-RS providers.

component.name: jackson-module-jaxb-annotations
component.description: Support for using JAXB annotations as an alternative to "native" Jackson annotations, for configuring data-binding.

component.name: jakarta.xml.bind-api
component.description: JAXB (JSR 222) API

component.name: jakarta.activation-api
component.description: ${project.name}

component.name: jackson-jaxrs-smile-provider
component.description: Functionality to handle Smile (binary JSON) input/output for JAX-RS implementations (like Jersey and RESTeasy) using standard Jackson data binding.

component.name: jersey-server
component.description: Jersey is the open source (under dual CDDL+GPL license) JAX-RS (JSR 311) production quality Reference Implementation for building RESTful Web services.

component.name: jersey-core
component.description: Jersey is the open source (under dual CDDL+GPL license) JAX-RS (JSR 311) production quality Reference Implementation for building RESTful Web services.

component.name: guice-servlet
component.description: Guice is a lightweight dependency injection framework for Java 6 and above

component.name: jersey-guice
component.description: Projects that provide additional functionality to jersey, like integration with other projects/frameworks.

component.name: jetty-server
component.description: The core jetty server artifact.

component.description: Utility classes for Jetty

component.name: jetty-proxy
component.description: Jetty Proxy

component.name: tesla-aether

component.name: aether-spi
component.description: The service provider interface for repository system implementations and repository connectors.

component.name: aether-util
component.description: A collection of utility classes to ease usage of the repository system.

component.description: An implementation of the repository system.

component.name: aether-connector-file
component.description: A repository connector implementation for repositories using file:// URLs.

component.name: aether-connector-okhttp
component.description: A repository connector implementation based on Square's OkHttp.

component.name: okhttp
component.description: An HTTP+SPDY client for Android and Java applications

component.name: wagon-provider-api
component.description: Maven Wagon API that defines the contract between different Wagon implementations

component.name: maven-aether-provider
component.description: Extensions to Aether for utilizing Maven POM and repository metadata.

component.name: maven-model
component.description: Model for Maven POM (Project Object Model)

component.description: The Plexus project provides a full software stack for creating and executing software projects.

component.description: Maven Settings model.

component.description: A client library for memcached.

component.description: Jetty Servlet Container

component.description: Utility Servlets from Jetty

component.name: derby
component.description: Contains the core Apache Derby database engine, which also includes the embedded JDBC driver.

component.name: derbynet
component.description: Contains the Apache Derby network server, which allows remote clients to connect to Derby databases over a network connection using the Derby client JDBC driver.

component.name: derbyclient
component.description: The Derby client JDBC driver, used to connect to a Derby server over a network connection.

component.description: A high performance caching library for Java 8+

component.description: Apache Commons DBCP software implements Database Connection Pooling

component.description: JetS3t is a free, open-source Java toolkit and application suite for Amazon Simple Storage Service (Amazon S3), Amazon CloudFront content delivery network, and Google Storage for Developers.

component.name: java-xmlbuilder
component.description: XML Builder is a utility that creates simple XML documents using relatively sparse Java code

component.name: commons-configuration
component.description: Tools to assist in the reading of configuration/preferences files in various formats

component.name: commons-digester
component.description: The Digester package lets you configure an XML->Java object mapping module which triggers certain actions called rules whenever a particular pattern of nested XML elements is recognized.

component.name: commons-beanutils-core
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.description: SLF4J LOG4J-12 Binding

component.description: Jackson is a high-performance JSON processor (parser, generator)

component.description: Data Mapper package is a high-performance data binding package built on Jackson JSON processor

component.description: Avro core components

component.description: Core Protocol Buffers library. Protocol Buffers are a way of encoding structured data in an efficient yet extensible format.

component.description: Java library for Javascript Object Signing and Encryption (JOSE) and JSON Web Tokens (JWT)

component.name: hive-storage-api
component.description: The Apache Software Foundation provides support for the Apache community of open-source software projects. The Apache projects are characterized by a collaborative, consensus based development process, an open and pragmatic software license, and a desire to create high quality software that leads the way in its field. We consider ourselves not simply a group of projects sharing a server, but rather a community of developers and users.

component.name: orc-mapreduce
component.description: An implementation of Hadoop's mapred and mapreduce input and output formats for ORC files. They use the core reader and writer, but present the data to the user in Writable objects.

component.name: orc-core
component.description: The core reader and writer for ORC files. Uses the vectorized column batch for the in memory representation.

component.name: orc-shims
component.description:
A shim layer for supporting various versions of Hadoop dynamically.
This module uses a higher version of Hadoop so that we can create shims that let us use new features of Hadoop without having a hard dependency on the latest version.

component.name: druid-lookups-cached-single
component.description: Extension to rename Druid dimension values using lookups

component.name: stringtemplate
component.description:
StringTemplate is a java template engine for generating source code, web pages, emails, or any other formatted text output.
StringTemplate is particularly good at multi-targeted code generators, multiple site skins, and internationalization/localization.
It evolved over years of effort developing jGuru.com.
StringTemplate also generates the stringtemplate website: http://www.stringtemplate.org and powers the ANTLR v3 code generator. Its distinguishing characteristic is that unlike other engines, it strictly enforces model-view separation.
Strict separation makes websites and code generators more flexible and maintainable; it also provides an excellent defense against malicious template authors.
There are currently about 600 StringTemplate source downloads a month.

component.name: antlr
component.description: A framework for constructing recognizers, compilers, and translators from grammatical descriptions containing Java, C#, C++, or Python actions.

component.name: aliyun-sdk-oss
component.description: The Aliyun OSS SDK for Java used for accessing Aliyun Object Storage Service

component.name: jdom
component.description: JDOM is, quite simply, a Java representation of an XML document. JDOM provides a way to represent that document for easy and efficient reading, manipulation, and writing. It has a straightforward API, is a lightweight and fast, and is optimized for the Java programmer. It's an alternative to DOM and SAX, although it integrates well with both DOM and SAX.

component.name: aliyun-java-sdk-core
component.description:
Aliyun Open API SDK for Java
Copyright (C) Alibaba Cloud Computing All rights reserved.
鐗堟潈鎵�鏈� 锛圕锛夐樋閲屼簯璁＄畻鏈夐檺鍏徃
http://www.aliyun.com

component.name: json
component.description:
JSON is a light-weight, language independent, data interchange format. See http://www.JSON.org/
The files in this package implement JSON encoders/decoders in Java. It also includes the capability to convert between JSON and XML, HTTP headers, Cookies, and CDL.
This is a reference implementation. There is a large number of JSON packages in Java. Perhaps someday the Java community will standardize on one. Until then, choose carefully.
The license includes this restriction: "The software shall be used for good, not evil." If your conscience cannot live with that, then choose a different package.
